description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CI that runs on push to the master branch, on pull requests, and daily at 6am UTC. The workflow has three jobs: MacOS, Docker_Linux, and windows. The MacOS job runs on macos-latest, checks out the code, caches LLVM artifacts, and runs tests with a script. The Docker_Linux job runs on ubuntu-latest with a matrix of LLVM and Ubuntu versions, builds and tests Docker images, and pushes them to GitHub and Docker Hub. The windows job runs on windows-latest, checks out the code, and runs tests with a batch script.
